event: View of Saint Mark's Basilica in Venice
symbols: basilica facade — the meeting of Eastern and Western Christianity in Venetian architecture
domes — the vault of heaven over the house of worship
description: A delicate watercolor depicting the ornate facade of Saint Mark's Basilica in Venice. The building's five large arched portals, elaborate Gothic tracery, multiple domes, and golden mosaic lunettes are rendered in soft washes of grey, lavender, pale blue, and touches of warm gold and orange. Small figures stand at the base of the building, giving scale to the massive structure. The piazza extends in the foreground as a pale open space. The sky is a soft, hazy lavender-grey. The overall effect is luminous and atmospheric.
